messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Losing the tmux socket is misread as all 8 agents dying — and the scripted recovery would have corrupted the repo
What it solves: WHAT HAPPENED. When the swarm's tmux socket was unlinked (BL-367), the runtime's health sweep read
`agents_running: 0` and enqueued EIGHT false `AGENT_EXITED` events — while the tmux server was
still alive, still owning all 8 panes, and all 8 role `claude` processes were alive and burning CPU.
How it works: Losing the control channel is reported as control lost, not as agents dying
